content:
Hi @Aaditya Saraf, let's move the conversations about editing NURBS to this stream/topic.

Let me point you to some places, where you can read about the work already done:

  • #brlcad > NURBS editing This is the stream/topic, where it was discussed before. (For now, I find the GSoC stream more appropriate for GSoC projects.) There, you find lot examples, which you can try with mged immediately.
  • https://github.com/BRL-CAD/brlcad/tree/main/src/libged/brep The place, where the brep (NURBS) specific mged commands are implemented.
  • https://github.com/BRL-CAD/brlcad/tree/main/src/libbrep The BRL-CAD adapter library for openNURBS.
@Daniel Rossberg hmm I read a bit about what Gregory implemented, it sure is quite fascinating but a little too difficult for me as a beginner, is there an easier project in your mind?
